title: DispMC's Optimization
description: An Optimization Modpack For Mobile Launchers.
body:
# **About This Modpack**
- This is an optimization modpack for Minecraft launchers on Android or iOS devices (e.g., Amethyst, Zalith Launcher, FCL, etc.). **This modpack is based on the Haste modpack by Confectionary**.
- This modpack also has some PVP helper mods (reduce lags).
- This modpack is **made entirely by Vietnamese developers**, so if you encounter any bugs while using it, please **feel free to report them** via our Discord server.
# **Why Did I Create This Modpack?**
- Because there is a **significant difference** in the rendering engines between PC and Mobile.
- The Sodium mod by the CaffeineMC team **DOES NOT** support mobile launchers. Therefore, this modpack includes a **modified version of Sodium** to **help minimize issues** on mobile devices.
# **Showcase**
- None yet :)
